description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Chaussette 080706 and earlier allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the _BASE parameter to scripts in Classes/ including (1) Evenement.php, (2) Event.php, (3) Event_for_month.php, (4) Event_for_week.php, (5) My_Log.php, (6) My_Smarty.php, and possibly (7) Event_for_month_per_day.php.
